sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime, details String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, '2023-01-01 00:00:00', 'New Year'), (2, '2023-01-01 01:01:01', 'First hour'), (3, NULL, 'Unknown time');
SELECT id, toMinute(event_time) AS minute FROM test_dates WHERE toMinute(event_time) < 30;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE toMinute(event_time) < toMinute('2023-06-01 10:30:00') AND event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, toMinute(event_time) AS minute FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL HAVING minute < 20);
SELECT id, toMinute(event_time) AS minute FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL AND (minute < toMinute('2023-05-01 10:15:30') OR event_time IS NULL) ORDER BY minute;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, toMinute(event_time) AS minute FROM test_dates;
INSERT INTO temp_dates SELECT 4, NULL FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_dates WHERE minute < (SELECT MAX(toMinute(event_time)) FROM test_dates) AND minute IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, toMinute(event_time) AS minute FROM test_dates WHERE toMinute(event_time) < (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_dates);
